g.text: Bit | Levels | Scale | Max Err | MSE

div.p: Error per element: ε(r) = r - scale * (q - zp) Error bound: |ε(r)| ≤ scale / 2 MSE approximation: MSE ≈ scale² / 12
Each bit removed quadruples the MSE. INT8 to INT4 is a 16x error increase. This is why GPTQ/AWQ is essential for model survival at low bits.
